missed_changes: Made a new concrete crypto×AI token bet via $70M EIGEN/EigenCloud investment — the prediction explicitly declined to name a single crypto×AI token
New large LayerZero (ZRO) token position: $55M with a 3-year lockup, for moving the financial system onchain
Active engagement with proof-of-personhood via World (Tools for Humanity / alexblania), giving the abstract sector claim a concrete vehicle
New emphasis on decentralized/quantum-resistant messaging (XMTP) and privacy (Aztec, Aleo) as themes not in the prediction
notes: Nearly every sector and token stance was confirmed through actions (investments) and public enthusiasm in the window. Crypto×AI is strongly confirmed via repeated EigenCloud verifiable-compute posts and the EIGEN investment, plus SolanaConf 'crypto x AI' panel. DePIN confirmed via Helium; stablecoins/payments via Loopcrypto and LayerZero. Solana confirmed via hosting Toly and the accelerator podcast; Ethereum confirmed via Aztec/EigenLayer/slashing enthusiasm. Risk-on confirmed by aggressive new capital deployment. The memecoin concern was never mentioned, so absent. Main unanticipated moves are the specific large token bets (EIGEN, ZRO) and the privacy/messaging themes.
